t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Passthrough from External_etoro_Billing_Withdraw. (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Wrong tier assignment. CID is read from External_etoro_Billing_Withdraw (fbd.[CID]), not looked up from Dim_Customer. The Dim_Customer join is only for RegulationID. Writer borrowed the Dim_Customer.RealCID description to upgrade a Tier 2 column to Tier 1.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.Regulation)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Short code for the regulation. Used in V_Dim_Customer and analytics dashboards. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_Regulation.Name via Dim_Customer.RegulationID. (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Regulation)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Dropped 'Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name', replaced with dim-lookup context. Core meaning preserved.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Ticker symbol. "USD", "EUR" for forex; "AAPL.US", "TSLA.US" for US stocks (format: TICKER.EXCHANGE); "BTC" for crypto. Unique across all instruments. Use this for human-readable instrument identification. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Currency upstream wiki)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Ticker symbol. "USD", "EUR" for forex; "AAPL.US", "TSLA.US" for US stocks (format: TICKER.EXCHANGE); "BTC" for crypto. Unique across all instruments. Use this for human-readable instrument identification. Dim-lookup passthrough from Dim_Currency.Abbreviation via ProcessCurrencyID. In this table, only USD, EUR, GBP, AUD, CAD appear (wire transfer currencies). (Tier 1 — Dictionary.Currency)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote_note: Core upstream text is verbatim; table-specific context appended after.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic but CID is selected from fbd (External_etoro_Billing_Withdraw), not from Dim_Customer. The SP joins Dim_Customer only for RegulationID. Writer borrowed the Dim_Customer.RealCID description to dress up a Tier 2 column. Should be Tier 2 — External_etoro_Billing_Withdraw.

Wiki claims CAD has no explicit aging threshold and 'may appear regardless of age'. In reality, the #final WHERE clause requires matching one of four OR-branches (USD/EUR, AUD+CySEC, AUD+non-CySEC, GBP). CAD matches NONE of them, so CAD rows are always excluded from the final output. The wiki gives analysts a false expectation that CAD rows can appear.
Summary says 'Filtered to wire transfers in USD, EUR, GBP, AUD, CAD only' but CAD is effectively excluded by the #final WHERE clause. The effective output covers only 4 currencies.
Upstream Dim_Regulation.Name says 'Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name' — wiki drops this line and substitutes dim-lookup context. Minor semantic loss.

Currency has exactly 5 values in #cashouts (4 effective in output) but the element description does not include inline key=value pairs mapping ProcessCurrencyID to abbreviation (1=USD, 2=EUR, 3=GBP, 5=AUD, 7=CAD).

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag CID as Tier 2 — External_etoro_Billing_Withdraw. It is NOT a dim-lookup; the SP reads CID directly from the billing external table. (2) Fix CAD business logic: the #final WHERE clause has no OR-branch matching CAD, so CAD rows are always excluded despite being in the #cashouts currency filter. Document this as effective exclusion or flag as a potential SP bug. (3) Update Section 1 to say 4 effective currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, AUD), noting CAD is filtered at the intermediate stage but excluded from the final output. (4) Restore verbatim text for Regulation from Dim_Regulation wiki: include 'Values match production Dictionary.Regulation.Name'. (5) Add inline ProcessCurrencyID key=value mapping to Currency element description.

skipped_phases: P2 and P3 not explicitly marked in wiki body
